title: Radium
description: (No longer maintained) A simple vanilla plus modpack.
body:
A client-side vanilla plus modpack perfect for multiplayer.
## Highlighted Mods
- Xaero's Map—Mini Map + World Map.
- WorldEdit—A tried and true editing tool.
- Axiom—An exceptional MC editing tool.
- Resourcify—Download packs straight from your client.
- Skin Shuffle—Change your skin in-game.
## Highlighted Packs
- Whimscape—A wonderful pixel art pack
- Unique Dark—Dark UI.
- Fresh Animations—Better animations.
- Detailed Animations—Better player animations.
## Highlighted Shaders
- FullBright—For when you go caving.
- Complementary—Beautiful shaders.
- BSL—Highly customizable shaders.
